transcript: Speaker A (AI): Where are you from? Speaker B (Human): I'm coming from Mirzapur. Speaker A (AI): It's just 'I come from Mirzapur'. Speaker B (Human): Oh, okay. Where do you put up? Speaker A (AI): 'Where are you staying?' is the correct way to ask. Speaker B (Human): Oh, got it. I'll remember this. I have improved a lot by talking to you. Thank you so much. I'll be back tomorrow. Speaker A (AI): You're welcome. While we have more than 3M+ learners, we can help you any time to build your English skills. So, join Sivi Pro. Install now.
on_screen_text: Day 1, Where are you from?, Join today for Just ₹3, I'm coming from Mirzapur., It's just I come from Mirzapur., Day 7, Where do you put up?, Where are you staying?, is the correct way to ask., Got it., I'll remember this., Day 15, I have improved a lot, by talking to you., Thank you so much., I'll be back tomorrow., 3M+ Learners, MySivi Pro, Install Now
summary: The ad shows a user's 15-day progress practicing English with an AI avatar that corrects common mistakes. It highlights the app's effectiveness and promotes MySivi Pro for just ₹3, urging users to install it.
